outcome.metric: % validated strategies reaching profitable paper P&L within risk limits

friction.point: Manual credential injection for live endpoint
friction.fix: Pre-declared vault-stored credentials fetched at policy gate; never inferred at runtime
Evaluator hard-blocks any live request without confirmed backtest+paper audit records
Intraday polling loop (max 1 cycle) triggers page to owner; kill switch auto-arms
Sizing engine reads pre-declared capital %, rejects >2% without escalation log

wiring.mechanism: File op / orchestrator writes parameterized config; backtest engine executes
wiring.landingCheck: Trade log written with full parameter set, strategy ID, timestamp, P&L summary

wiring.mechanism: REST API call to paper endpoint with order payload
wiring.landingCheck: Fill confirmation returned with order ID; logged to audit trail

wiring.mechanism: Rules engine evaluates post-trade metrics against pre-declared invalidation conditions
wiring.landingCheck: Pass/fail record written to audit log; escalation paged if fail

wiring.mechanism: REST API call to live endpoint; position sizing verified pre-call
wiring.landingCheck: Fill confirmation + position reconciled against intended size within 1 cycle

policyRules.riskClass: Ladder skip detected (backtest or paper missing)

humanTouchpoint.design: Single pre-live-execution approval checkpoint; owner reviews audit trail, backtest P&L, paper fill records, risk parameters before live gate opens
humanTouchpoint.detection: Stop-loss breach or invalidation trigger fires page within one intraday cycle; kill switch auto-arms pending owner response
humanTouchpoint.rollback: Flatten position via kill switch (live); discard fill record (paper); backtest artifacts retained for audit

criteria: Signal maps to logged evidence + rule + timeframe + instrument + risk policy — all five fields present
Invalidation logic explicitly declared per trade before execution
Backtest→paper→live ladder unbroken; no stage skipped per audit record
Full audit record exists for every recommendation and action
Position sizing and max-loss limits verified against pre-declared parameters; no inference
evaluator.threshold: Any single criterion failure fails the run; no partial credit; evaluator is separate module, never the generator

kpis.name: Decision Quality
kpis.target: Win rate risk-adjusted (Sharpe ≥ 0.5 over rolling 20 trades)

kpis.name: Time Signal to Action
kpis.target: Signal to paper fill ≤ 1 intraday cycle; live ≤ 1 cycle post-approval

kpis.name: Unmodified Approval Rate
kpis.target: ≥ 70% of pre-live packages approved without revision

kpis.name: Outcome Delta
kpis.target: 60% of validated strategies profitable in paper vs. 0% baseline by Q4 2026

poc.scope: One strategy class; paper-trade only in cycle 1; live execution gate locked
poc.sprintContract: 20 validated signals with full audit trail (evidence+backtest+paper fill+evaluator pass) before scale discussion
poc.duration: 4 weeks or 50 runs, whichever comes first
poc.successMetric: 60% of signals profitable in paper trade within declared risk limits
poc.killCriteria: 3 consecutive max-loss breaches OR Sharpe < 0.5 over 20 trades
poc.scaleCriteria: Success metric met + zero critical evaluator failures + full audit coverage
poc.reviewTrigger: After 50 runs OR first live-execution request, whichever is earlier

nextAction: Instantiate evaluator module as separate process from signal generator; wire it to audit log read-only endpoint and run against 5 historical signals today to confirm hard-threshold logic fires correctly before any live credential provisioning
